summary: Backend API Testing - Iteration 13 COMPLETE. 17/17 tests PASS. All 7 data integrity fixes (FIX 6-12) verified working.
critical_code_review_comments: ✓ FIX 6: Avatar propagation to problems collection - PUT /api/users/me/profile with avatarUrl updates problems.user_avatar_url
✓ FIX 7: Unique index on community_members.user_id - created in startup_event (line 5181)
✓ FIX 8: Community codes normalized to uppercase - admin_create_community and join_community both use .strip().upper()
✓ FIX 8: Unique index on communities.active_code - created in startup_event (line 5182)
✓ FIX 9: Unique compound index on blocked_users (blocker_user_id, blocked_user_id) - created in startup_event (line 5183-5184)
✓ FIX 10: Bidirectional block filtering - get_blocked_user_ids() returns both users I blocked AND users who blocked me
✓ FIX 10: relate_problem, create_comment, follow_user all check blocked_ids and return 403
✓ FIX 11: Notification.problem_id is Optional[str] = None (nullable) - line 377
✓ FIX 12: POST /api/admin/sync-problem-stats recalculates relates_count, comments_count, unique_commenters for all problems
✓ FIX 12: sync-problem-stats requires admin role (require_admin dependency)

success_rate.frontend: N/A (React Native app - backend only testing requested)

seed_data_creation: Test users created with unique UUIDs for each test, no persistent test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 data integrity fixes (FIX 6-12) verified working. Key test scenarios: 1) Avatar propagation to problems when profile updated, 2) Community code normalization to uppercase, 3) Bidirectional blocking prevents relate/comment/follow in both directions, 4) Admin sync-problem-stats recalculates counters, 5) MongoDB unique indexes on community_members.user_id, communities.active_code, and blocked_users compound index. Frontend is React Native (Expo) - cannot be tested via browser.

features_verified.fix10_blocker_cannot_relate: PASS - 403 when blocker tries to relate to blocked user's frikt
features_verified.fix10_blocker_cannot_comment: PASS - 403 when blocker tries to comment on blocked user's frikt
features_verified.fix10_blocker_cannot_follow: PASS - 403 when blocker tries to follow blocked user
features_verified.fix10_blocked_cannot_relate: PASS - 403 when blocked user tries to relate to blocker's frikt (bidirectional)
features_verified.fix10_blocked_cannot_comment: PASS - 403 when blocked user tries to comment on blocker's frikt (bidirectional)
features_verified.fix10_blocked_cannot_follow: PASS - 403 when blocked user tries to follow blocker (bidirectional)
features_verified.fix12_sync_problem_stats_admin: PASS - returns success with corrections count

notes: This is a React Native/Expo mobile app. Frontend testing via Playwright is not possible. All 7 data integrity fixes have been verified working through comprehensive backend API tests.
